umlaufmappe_ref.label: Umlaufmappe
umlaufmappe_ref.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Umlaufmappe' with the id `69d34a329d0bfb14d67f386b` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69d34a329d0bfb14d67f386b/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

person_ref.label: Person
person_ref.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Personenstamm' with the id `69d34a2fba1095e8bb80aaad` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69d34a2fba1095e8bb80aaad/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

aufgabentyp.label: Aufgabentyp
aufgabentyp.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.

bemerkung.label: Bemerkung
bemerkung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

vorname.label: Vorname
vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

nachname.label: Nachname
nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

abteilung.label: Abteilung
abteilung.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

telefon.label: Telefonnummer
telefon.description: A valid telephone number (or `null`/`None`). Might include country prefix and should include area code.

titel.label: Titel der Umlaufmappe
titel.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

zweck.label: Zweck / Beschreibung
zweck.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

erstellungsdatum.label: Erstellungsdatum
erstellungsdatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

faelligkeitsdatum.label: Fälligkeitsdatum
faelligkeitsdatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

status.label: Status
status.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.

anhang_1.label: Anhang 1
anhang_1.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/69d34a329d0bfb14d67f386b/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

anhang_2.label: Anhang 2
anhang_2.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/69d34a329d0bfb14d67f386b/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

anhang_3.label: Anhang 3
anhang_3.description:
